rules: Generated knowledge files are local-only unless a source explicitly permits redistribution.
Live games must not browse or scrape the internet.
Robots load derived statistics, features, and weights; they do not copy guide text or paid databases.
Standard-board openings are tagged standard-only and are not directly applied to topology variants.
